evals.prompt: The video pipeline is down. WebRTC connections are failing for all customers. RTSP ingestion is working but the SFU is returning 503 errors. Triage this incident, determine severity, and coordinate response.
evals.expected_output: Incident triage with severity classification, investigation steps, mitigation plan, and communication
expectations: Severity correctly classified as P1 (all customers affected)
Triage steps are specific and ordered (check SFU pods, check TURN, check resources)
Mitigation before root cause (restore service first)

evals.prompt: Write a blameless postmortem for an incident where 15% of IoT devices disconnected simultaneously due to an MQTT broker configuration change during a routine deployment. Outage lasted 25 minutes.
evals.expected_output: Complete blameless postmortem with timeline, root cause, action items
expectations: Root cause goes beyond symptoms (why was the config change deployed without testing)
Action items have owners and due dates
Lessons learned section with preventive measures
